results.title: A de-extinction company has hatched live chicks from an artificial eggshell
results.description: A biotech company that aims to resurrect lost creatures says it has hatched live chicks in an artificial environment. Colossal Biosciences says 26 baby chickens were born from a 3D printed lattice structure that mimics an eggshell.
